summary: Guarantee every new GO intent creates a repo-local task before execution
description: Guarantee every new GO intent creates a repo-local task before execution
acceptance: Bare Go and Go loop with a new intent materialize a .go/tasks/open task and task.created event before any product diff
Direct go-loop without an existing task fails closed with an instruction to supply intent through go or create a task
No product execution can begin without a claimed active task

evidence.summary: RED: two new regressions failed because GO ignored intent when backlog existed and empty direct go-loop reported completion. GREEN: four focused task-first/router tests passed. Broad: 87/88 smoke tests passed; sole remaining failure is the unreleased v0.3.4 provenance pin and is owned by release-v035-task-first. Docs and active stack skill now require task.created before execution and direct empty loop fails closed.
